info.title: About
info.intro: A short overview of Vire and an optional in-browser Linux trial before you decide.
info.tryLinuxIntro: Choose Linux Mint or Fedora. Opens in a new tab via noVNC to the lab server. This is a demo: do not enter sensitive data.
info.mintBody: Familiar Cinnamon workflow and a calm upgrade cadence — a gentle first step.
info.fedoraBody: Newer toolchain and strong developer defaults — try this if you want a fresher stack.
info.tryLinuxSecurityHint: Security: this is a lab / demo environment. Do not enter passwords or personal data. For production use HTTPS (e.g. infra/try-linux docker-compose.tls.yml with Caddy), set a shared access_token (TRY_LINUX_ACCESS_TOKEN / NEXT_PUBLIC_TRY_LINUX_ACCESS_TOKEN), and firewall appropriately. Raw VNC ports (59xx) must not be exposed to the internet — only behind the websockify proxy.
info.notConfigured: Browser demo is not wired yet. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_TRY_LINUX_PROXY_BASE (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8080) and deploy infra/try-linux.

about.title: About us
about.intro: Vire is a small Finnish company. We refurbish laptops and desktops with SSD upgrades, extra RAM, and Linux — for homes and businesses.
about.companyNote: VAT liable. We operate in Finland.
about.addressLines:
Vire Oy
Example Street 1 A 2
FI-00100 Helsinki
Finland
about.person1Bio: Field service, compatibility checks, and installations.

tilaus.title: Order tracking
tilaus.introHub: Enter your order ID (from the confirmation email) and the same email you used when ordering.
tilaus.introPrefill: Enter the same email you used when ordering. The order ID is prefilled.
tilaus.privacyHint: Details are never shown without a matching email. Do not share your order link with strangers.
tilaus.errorNotFound: No order matches these details. Check the order ID and email.
tilaus.errorGeneric: Lookup failed. Please try again in a moment.
tilaus.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
tilaus.specsEmpty: No automatic spec summary for this machine.

footer.tagline: Turn older computers into fast, durable machines — SSD, RAM, and Linux.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: This page could not be shown. You can try again or return home.

globalError.title: Vire — error
globalError.description: An unexpected error occurred. Refresh the page or try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The link may be outdated or the page has moved.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.metaDescription: How Vire handles personal data on the website and in orders.
privacy.intro: This is a short customer-facing summary. Replace with your legal register description where required.
privacy.section1Body: Vire Oy. Contact details: see About us.
privacy.section2Body: Order forms: name, email, phone, and address for fulfilment. Payments are processed by Stripe; we do not store card numbers on our servers.
privacy.section3Body: We may use Plausible (cookieless). Configure via NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN.
privacy.section4Body: Order records are kept for accounting and support as required by law. You may request correction or erasure via our support where applicable.
privacy.section5Body: We update this page when our practices change.

home.title: Your computer deserves a second life
home.subtitle: We install an SSD, more RAM, and Linux. Fast boot, safer use, smaller footprint.
home.speedVerdict: Typical win: much shorter boot time with an SSD and a lighter system.
home.step1: Tell us your model or share specs
home.pricingFootnote: A spinning hard drive (HDD) slows boot — an SSD and a light Linux install are where most users feel the win. Exact packages and optional data transfer: Service page.

palvelu.title: Service
palvelu.intro: We refurbish laptops and desktops. Tell us about your machine — we handle the rest.
palvelu.how1: Share brand and model or send specs.
palvelu.how2: See compatibility and estimated speed benefit.
palvelu.how4: Choose support level and enter contact details.
palvelu.how5: Pay securely with Stripe — confirmation by email.
palvelu.pricingNote: Prices include VAT. Exact total is shown at checkout.
palvelu.migrationFaqTitle: Data transfer from Windows to Linux
palvelu.migrationFaqIntro: You can add an optional data migration when you order the service.
palvelu.migrationFaqA1: Depending on your order, we can move files, photos, bookmarks, and email account settings. Games and Windows-only apps may not run on Linux — mention your needs in the order notes.
palvelu.migrationFaqA2: The add-on (+€35 or +€50) appears in your order summary and on the Stripe checkout page. It is optional.
palvelu.migrationFaqA3: Yes, if the machine supports dual boot. Mention this in notes or when you order.
palvelu.b2bBanner: Need several machines or a business quote?
palvelu.wizardLegalHint: By continuing you accept the order terms and processing of personal data to fulfill the order.

wizard.title: Order
wizard.migrationHint: Optional add-on: we move important files and settings to the new system. The price is added to your service total.
wizard.migrationLargeHint: +€{price} — lots of media or roughly over 100 GB (estimate)
wizard.stripeMissing: Payments disabled: set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY in the environment.
wizard.errorGeneric: Checkout failed. Try again or contact us.
wizard.specsHint: Summary and link come from a public search index (SearXNG) and optionally your local AI — verify if unsure.
wizard.specsEmpty: No automatic results — you can still continue.

reasons.already_ssd: Drive is already SSD-like — smaller benefit.
reasons.low_ram: Low RAM — we recommend checking memory.
reasons.ssd_upgrade_strongly_recommended: SSD upgrade brings the biggest benefit.

b2b.title: Business and volume orders
b2b.metaDescription: Request a quote for multiple machines or a tailored business arrangement.
b2b.intro: Tell us what you need — we will reply by email. The consumer checkout flow is below; this form is for companies and larger batches.
b2b.sentOk: Your quote request was sent. We will get back to you as soon as we can.
b2b.errorValidation: Please check the fields and try again.
b2b.errorConfig: Quote requests are not enabled in this environment yet. Email us at tuki@vire.fi.
b2b.errorSend: Sending failed. Try again shortly or email tuki@vire.fi.

thanks.title: Thank you for your order!
thanks.serviceBody: Payment received. We will email a confirmation.
thanks.genericBody: If payment is still pending, return to the service page. Otherwise check your email.

itse.title: Do it yourself
itse.intro: Guides, videos, and Linux USB order.
itse.usbBlurb: €9.90 — ready-to-use install media. Pay securely with Stripe.
itse.usbError: Order failed. Check fields or Stripe configuration.

thanks.title: Thank you for your USB order!
thanks.usbBody: Payment received. We will email a confirmation.
thanks.genericBody: If payment is still pending, return to the DIY page.

sovellukset.title: App alternatives
sovellukset.intro: Windows apps often have a free Linux-friendly option.

tuki.title: Support
tuki.intro: We help before and after installation.
tuki.bookingIntro: Pick a slot in the calendar (when Calendly is configured).
tuki.bookingNotConfigured: Scheduling is not wired yet. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_CALENDLY_EMBED_URL (Calendly inline embed URL).
tuki.formIntro: We deliver this to the inbox set in SUPPORT_NOTIFY_EMAIL (server-side).
tuki.formSent: Thanks! Your message was sent. We will get back to you as soon as we can.
tuki.formError: Send failed. Try again in a moment or email us directly.
tuki.formNotConfigured: Form not enabled: set SUPPORT_NOTIFY_EMAIL and RESEND_API_KEY.
tuki.formRateLimit: Too many submissions. Wait a moment and try again.

yhteiso.title: Community
yhteiso.intro: Join Discord — questions, tips, and peer help.
yhteiso.discordBlockLead: Ask about installs, hardware, and distros — we and the community help out.
yhteiso.youtubeIntro: Short how-tos and demos on our YouTube channel.
yhteiso.guidelinesBody: Be kind, no spam. Focus on computers and Linux.
yhteiso.widgetIntro: See who is online and join the server (when the server ID is configured).

admin.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Check email and password.
admin.ordersStub: Manage orders and send completion emails.
admin.usbOrdersIntro: Linux USB stick orders (pending and paid).
admin.modelsIntro: Add models and complete checks. Unchecked items are listed first.
admin.modelsErrorDuplicate: This make and model already exists.
admin.modelCompatibleHint: Saving marks the model approved or rejected and stamps the review.
admin.guidesIntro: Edit MDX content and publishing. Metadata is stored in the database.
admin.guidesNewIntro: Write MDX body only; front matter is regenerated on save.
admin.guideErrSlug: Slug may only contain lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.
admin.guideErrMinutes: Duration must be at least 1 minute.
admin.guideSaveHint: Save writes content/guides/ and updates the database.
